user.title: Set up Greg
user.description: Greg is a Marvin-inspired AI personality for your coffee table. Connect a vibration sensor and a speaker, and Greg will comment on everything happening around him. Mostly negatively.

data_description.vibration_sensor: Any binary sensor that detects vibration. Protocol does not matter.
data_description.media_player: The speaker Greg will talk through.
data_description.volume: Default is 0.35. Low enough to not be immediately annoying.
data_description.quiet_hours_enabled: Greg will stay silent during quiet hours.
data_description.quiet_start: Greg goes quiet at this time.

advanced.title: Advanced settings
advanced.description: These settings let you tune Greg's behavior. Defaults are conservative. Adjusting these is your responsibility.

data_description.soft_threshold: Vibrations before Greg makes a soft comment. Default: 1.
data_description.chaos_threshold: Vibrations before full chaos mode. Default: 6.
data_description.reset_delay: Seconds before the vibration counter resets. Default: 8.
data_description.silence_timeout: Minutes of inactivity before Greg comments on the silence. Default: 20.
data_description.existential_interval: How often Greg has an unprompted existential crisis, in minutes. Default: 37.
data_description.sensitivity: How sensitive Greg is to vibration. Higher = more reactive. No upper cap at advanced level.
data_description.suppress_chime: Attempts to suppress the connection chime on Google/Nest speakers. May not work on all devices — this is a hardware limitation outside Greg's control.

error.invalid_sensor: Could not find that vibration sensor. Check the entity ID.
error.invalid_player: Could not find that media player. Check the entity ID.
error.invalid_time: Time must be in HH:MM format.

abort.already_configured: Greg is already running. Only one instance is supported per installation in v1.1.
